description_long: This modern bungalow features a sleek, rectangular structure with a dark, flat roof and expansive glass windows along the front facade. The front porch is covered and furnished with potted plants and seating, providing a welcoming outdoor space. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious deck area, complete with a hot tub, outdoor dining set, grill, and lounge furniture, all enclosed by a white railing. The side walls are mostly solid with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy, while the rear deck area is visually open and inviting. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of dark wood or composite siding, glass, and metal accents. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat dark roof, large front windows, a covered porch, and a spacious rear deck featuring outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, large glass windows, potted plants, and seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid dark wall with a narrow window and a glimpse of the rear deck's tented lounge area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open deck with a hot tub, outdoor dining set, grill, lounge furniture, and white railing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wall and a partial view of the rear deck and tented lounge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front-facing windows with minimal side windows
